project.name: KosPintar
project.description: Smart property management system with mock data for UI-first development

onSessionStart.name: setup-dev-environment
onSessionStart.description: Set up development environment on session start

beforeCommit.name: quality-check
beforeCommit.description: Run type-check and lint before committing

afterBuild.name: build-summary
afterBuild.command: echo '✅ Build complete! Ready to test.'

addingFeature: Add mock data if needed: npm run add:mock
Test in browser: npm run dev
beforePushing: Run full check: npm run dev:check

mockData.note: All mock data centralized - easy swap to API when ready
